label: 2 m
notes: 2 m half of a VHF/UHF LEO satellite pair, squircle (rounded-corner square) loops. RHCP, self-phased crossed loops with a drooping radial reflector to favor high-elevation passes. Round tubing; square loops with radiused corners ease bending around a square frame while keeping the corners gentle. Targets: axial ratio < 3 dB over the coverage cone, VSWR < 1.5 after matching. Reflector count, spacing, and droop left for the optimizer.
